steps: Launch the app and open an editor project with a video file (e.g. eval/fixtures/toaster_example.mp4).
Confirm that an 'Export format' picker is rendered adjacent to the 'Export Edited Media' button.
Confirm the picker options come from the backend (via `commands.listAllowedExportFormats`) by inspecting the Network/Tauri invoke log or the component's React DevTools state — no hard-coded TS list.
Confirm the picker default selection equals the current `settings.export_format` (default Mp4).
Open Settings -> Advanced -> Export.
Confirm the format dropdown is present, bound to `settings.export_format`, and changes are persisted across an app restart.
Inspect `src/components/settings/advanced/ExportGroup.tsx` diff: no structural change to the component.
Set `settings.export_format` to Mp3 via Advanced settings.
Open an editor project without touching the new picker.
Click 'Export Edited Media'; confirm the resulting file is .mp3.
Run the specta regen command for the project (exact invocation per CONTRIBUTING.md).
Confirm `git diff src/bindings.ts` shows the new `format_override` parameter on `exportEditedMedia` and that no other hand edits are present.
Run `pnpm tsc --noEmit` and confirm zero errors.
Open an editor project with a .mov source and `settings.export_format` = Mp4.
Do not change the new picker.
Click Export; confirm the save-dialog suggests a filename ending in `.mp4`.
Open an editor project with a .mov source and `settings.export_format` = Mp4.
Change the new picker to Mp3.
Click Export; confirm the save-dialog suggests a filename ending in `.mp3`.
Confirm the produced file is a valid MP3.

AC-007-b.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Recurse src,src-tauri/src -Include *.ts,*.tsx,*.rs | ForEach-Object { $c=(Get-Content $_.FullName | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; if ($c -gt 800) { Write-Host \"$($_.FullName): $c\"; exit 1 } }; exit 0"
steps: Run the line-count check against every .ts/.tsx/.rs file under src/ and src-tauri/src/.
Confirm the command exits 0.

Specifically inspect the touched files (src/components/editor/EditorView.tsx, src/components/editor/ExportFormatPicker.tsx, src-tauri/src/commands/waveform/export_format.rs, src-tauri/src/commands/waveform/commands.rs) and confirm each is under 800 lines.
